items.reviewerNotes: Source sign is a right-turn lane; approved q0791 and remapped local answer to B. Rejected initial q0755 because it is the left-turn lane sign.
Source image matches q0380 traffic-light image; the lit arrow permits right turn. Remapped to Russian option C and rejected guide-arrow candidates.
No-left-or-right-turn sign; source option D maps to q0716 canonical no left or right turn.
Same handbrake image as q0588; Russian option order puts handbrake at A while canonical answer is D.
Source sharp-curve stopping-distance image matches q0513; answer 50m is Russian option D, not candidate q0610.
Source sign reads expressway entrance ahead 2 km; approved q0798 and remapped to Russian option B. Rejected initial q0689 gas-station candidate.
Triangular filled area is the traffic-flow guide line; source option D maps to q0762 canonical guide line.
Temporary stop in rainy/cloudy weather matches q0166; correct action is hazard lights, Russian option B. Rejected q0150 fog-driving candidate.
Valid MCQ for one-side door-open indicator. Existing q0602 uses the both-side-doors symbol/answer, while q0537/q0552 are ROW variants, so no safe existing MCQ qid matches.
Source sign is no right turn and matches q0715, which was outside the displayed top candidates; local answer is B.
Source control stalk is the lights/turn-signal combination switch; approved q0618 and rejected q0592 wiper-switch candidate.
Same improper meeting-place question as q0170; Russian option B maps to canonical reduce speed/stop to yield.
End of no-overtaking restriction sign; source option D maps to q0696 canonical overtaking ban is lifted.
Same stop-overtaking-if-front-vehicle-refuses-to-yield question; Russian option C maps to q0185 canonical option B.
Source indicator image is the left-turn signal indicator and matches q0594; local answer is C. Rejected q0391 speed-reducing-lane light-use candidate.
